summary: This document is an interview guide prepared for a meeting with Tara Donnelly, a senior NHS digital leader. It outlines key discussion points regarding the startup's problem definition, go-to-market strategy, and potential funding sources within the UK healthcare system. The text serves as a strategic framework for validating the business model with industry experts.
